sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ النَّاسَ فِي حَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija pomaže ljudima u rješavanju teških problema.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence helps people solve difficult problems.

sentences.arabic: تَتَعَلَّمُ الْحَوَاسِيبُ كَيْفَ تُفَكِّرُ وَتُحَلِّلُ الْبَيَانَاتِ الضَّخْمَةَ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Računari uče kako razmišljati i brzo analizirati ogromne podatke.
sentences.translationEn: Computers learn how to think and analyze huge data quickly.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةُ تَتَطَوَّرُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِتَجْعَلَ حَيَاتَنَا أَسْهَلَ.
sentences.translation: Ova tehnologija se razvija svakim danom kako bi nam olakšala život.
sentences.translationEn: This technology evolves every day to make our lives easier.
